title: Add graceful shutdown handling
description: broadside serve has no graceful shutdown. On SIGTERM/SIGINT, the delivery worker, feed pollers, and directory watcher should finish their current operation and drain cleanly. Use tokio::signal and a CancellationToken or similar.
close_reason: Media pipeline (MIME sniff, resize, EXIF strip, blurhash), actor key cache with TTL+invalidation, inbox signature verification, --media CLI, webhook media fetch, feed enclosure attachments, graceful shutdown
